title: poa stelligera
intro: Poa stelligera, also known as the star-point bluegrass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of North America. The medicinal properties of Poa stelligera include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Poa stelligera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
